tech_news.title: Bethesda teases Fallout 5 soon after Xbox’s mass layoffs - The Verge
tech_news.description: Bethesda has announced a number of new Fallout projects, including Fallout 5, not long after Xbox was hit with mass layoffs.

tech_news.title: Even Microsoft couldn’t make Windows 11 work well on 8GB of RAM - The Verge
tech_news.description: Microsoft’s new entry-level 13-inch Surface Laptop pairs last year’s  great hardware with a higher price and just 8GB of RAM. Thanks, RAMageddon.

tech_news.title: No, Doom maker id Software hasn't been "nerfed into the ground and gutted" by the Xbox cuts, insists director Hugo Martin - Eurogamer.net
tech_news.description: Doom and Quake creator id Software tries to reassure fans it's okay following the devastating recent Xbox cuts.

tech_news.title: LG TVs and monitors said to surveil users and install bloatware without asking - Notebookcheck
tech_news.description: Anyone who owns an LG smart TV must inform all guests and family members that they are being monitored – this is required by LG’s current terms of use. Meanwhile, LG monitors install potential malware and surveillance software on a connected Windows computer.

tech_news.title: Castlevania: Belmont’s Curse hands-on report - PlayStation.Blog
tech_news.description: Konami and Evil Empire get the blood pumping with slick combat in classic Castlevania.

tech_news.title: Exclusive: Diagnostics log confirms iPhone 18 Pro Max camera specs ahead of launch - Notebookcheck
tech_news.description: An ISP diagnostics log, part of the trove of internal Tata Electronics files leaked in June by the World Leaks ransomware group, confirms several previously rumored iPhone 18 Pro Max camera specs ahead of Apple's official announcement.

tech_news.title: Why Do Roku Remotes Have Tags – And Can You Remove Them? - bgr.com
tech_news.description: The little purple tags on Roku remotes are solely there for brand recognition, and though they can be removed, doing so is trickier than you might think.

tech_news.title: iOS 27 adds an all-new app to your iPhone’s Home Screen - 9to5Mac

tech_news.title: 'Extremely Happy' — Microsoft Restores Player's 25-Year-Old Account After Deleting It Due to Hacker - IGN
tech_news.description: Microsoft has restored a player’s access to his 25-year-old account, which contained photos of his son and thousands of dollars worth of games.

tech_news.title: It’s official: EU will force Google to share search data and open up AI on Android - Ars Technica
tech_news.description: Google says these changes could endanger user privacy and security.
